## Description
- Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Related Issue
- Link to the issue: `Closes #123` or `Part of #123`.

## Changes
- What files/modules are affected (e.g., `frontend/`, `backend/`, `devops/`, `testing/`).
- Any configuration or environment changes (e.g., `.env.example`, `docker-compose.yml`).

## Testing
- How to test locally (commands or steps).
- What new/changed tests were added or updated.

## Checks (please tick before requesting review)
- [ ] I have tested locally and changes work as expected.
- [ ] I have followed the commit message format (e.g., `feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`).
- [ ] PR description includes a clear summary and links to the related issue.
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials are included in the code.
- [ ] I have run linters and formatting tools where applicable.
- [ ] I have checked that CI build / tests pass before requesting review.
